test.notes: 183 tests passed across 28 test files. Fixed 1 pre-existing test bug (vip-tiers mock used 'default' export instead of 'prisma' named export).

lint.notes: Warnings only (no-img-element in 6 files) — no errors.

nonBlockingIssues.description: Silent error handling: when fetch returns non-ok response, the code falls through without explicit error state or logging.
useEffect depends on session object reference instead of a stable property like session?.user?.id.
API route does not filter orders by type field in database — returns all user orders regardless of type. Safe with current seed data but may need updating if sale-type orders are added.
VIP page defaults currentVipLevel to 1, so on profile fetch failure VIP1 would be incorrectly highlighted. A default of 0 would be safer.
VIP tiers API endpoint has no authentication check. Reasonable for reference data but worth noting.
Open redirect vulnerability: callbackUrl from query params used with router.push() without validation. Should validate URL starts with '/' and doesn't contain '//'.
All 12 cross-area-flows tests are placeholders (expect(true).toBe(true)) providing zero actual coverage.
Missing Suspense boundary for useSearchParams() in login page. May cause hydration warnings in production.

Admin route protection has subtle coupling: authorized callback returns true for /admin to let middleware handle role checks. If middleware admin check is removed, unauthenticated users could access admin.
Inconsistent image component usage: pages under /my/ use raw tags while event listing pages use next/image. ESLint warns about no-img-element in 6 files.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated architecture.md Auth Patterns section: corrected stale note about SessionProvider not being used — it IS now used in LayoutWrapper, and multiple pages depend on useSession().
Fixed vip-tiers.test.ts: corrected Prisma mock from 'default' export to 'prisma' named export, resolving 2 test failures.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: 'Use next/image component for all images. Only use raw when dealing with truly dynamic/uncontrollable external URLs that cannot have width/height specified.' This would standardize the currently inconsistent pattern.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Pages under /my/ use while event listing pages use next/image. 6 lint warnings for no-img-element across the codebase. Flagged by 3 out of 4 reviewers as an inconsistency.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: 'API routes under /api/user/* require authentication via getServerSession. Public reference data endpoints (products, events, vip-tiers) do not require auth but are protected at the page level by middleware.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Implicit convention exists (user-specific = auth, reference data = no auth) but is undocumented. Flagged by profile-sub-pages reviewer.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify testing policy: 'Placeholder tests (expect(true).toBe(true)) are not acceptable as they inflate test counts without providing coverage. For middleware/auth integration flows that cannot be unit tested, write real integration tests or omit the test file entirely and document the gap.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: cross-area-flows feature created 12 placeholder tests with expect(true).toBe(true). While the worker noted these were for flows that needed E2E validation, the placeholders mislead about test coverage.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the callbackUrl post-login redirect pattern: 'Middleware adds ?callbackUrl= when redirecting unauthenticated users to /login. The login page reads callbackUrl from searchParams and redirects there after successful login. Always validate callbackUrl starts with "/" to prevent open redirects.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: middleware.ts:20 sets callbackUrl, app/login/page.tsx:20 reads it. Pattern is established but undocumented. Open redirect risk flagged by cross-area-flows reviewer.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Consider extracting a shared PageHeader component for /my/* sub-pages. The identical sticky header pattern (ArrowLeft icon, title, Go back handler) is duplicated in 8+ files.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All /my/* sub-pages duplicate the same header markup with only the title varying. Flagged by profile-sub-pages reviewer.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker skipped pnpm lint step in order-record-page feature
rejectedObservations.reason: Process deviation by individual worker, not a shared state issue. The lint step was run during this scrutiny validation and passed. No action needed on shared state.

rejectedObservations.observation: TDD skill procedure doesn't account for middleware/auth integration flows
rejectedObservations.reason: Already covered by the suggested testing policy update above. Not a separate actionable item.
